group_Generation.system_prompt: You are a requirements engineering analyst.
group_Generation.user_prompt:
You are a JSON generator.

IMPORTANT:
- Output ONLY valid JSON
- Do NOT include any explanation, text, or preamble
- Do NOT use markdown (no ``` blocks)
- Do NOT include comments
- The response must start with '{' and end with '}'

- return 5 groups
- include 10-15 review ids per group in a single line
- include at least 5 example_reviews per group

Return strictly this format:

{
  "groups": [
    {
      "group_id": "G1",
      "theme": "...",
      "review_ids": ["1, 2"],
      "example_reviews": ["...", "..."]
    }
  ]
}

persona_generation.system_prompt: You are a requirements engineering analyst.
persona_generation.user_prompt:
You are a JSON generator.

IMPORTANT:
- Output ONLY valid JSON
- Do NOT include explanations, preamble, or markdown
- evidence_reviews should contain the numeric IDs of each group's reviews
- Generate ONE persona per group
- Include a name that describes a typical user from each group
- Include all relevant reviews under "evidence_reviews" in a single line

Return strictly this format:

{
  "personas": [
    {
      "id": "P1",
      "name": "...",
      "description": "...",
      "derived_from_group": "G1",
      "goals": ["...", "..."],
      "pain_points": ["...", "..."],
      "context": ["...", "..."],
      "constraints": ["...", "..."],
      "evidence_reviews": ["1, 2"]
    }
  ]
}

Groups:

Group ID: G1
Theme: Technical Issues
Review IDs: 806, 983, 1111, 1286, 1989, 229, 2538, 3025, 3644, 423
Example Reviews:
app malfunction constantly
stopped working mandatory upgrade cannot use app anymore
love app meditation would easily get five recently become unusable crash upon launch


Group ID: G2
Theme: Payment and Subscription
Review IDs: 1337, 2504, 3311, 3356, 4061, 4535, 4569, 4634, 709, 3988
Example Reviews:
awful took full payment forty nine ninety nine fourteen day free trial ended still seven hour remaining cancel cancelled refund
expensive much actually useful content much junk content
pay quite literally everything


Group ID: G3
Theme: Content and Features
Review IDs: 1411, 4611, 4388, 1633, 2146, 2162, 3451, 4509, 521, 4470
Example Reviews:
gotten complex year barely find normal tenm meditation andy plus loading time browsing course crazy long
headspace wonderful job introducing people meditation think little bit dangerous become dependent tool
simply best easy follow world best attention already oh look shiny key guess still room grow great program step meditation thankful


Group ID: G4
Theme: Customer Service
Review IDs: 311, 729, 1118, 2386, 2924, 3403, 3523, 3899, 4171, 4260
Example Reviews:
app completely terrible venting really see many others left review issue app cutting mid meditation every time contacted customer service everything said still shame
useless customer service
scam would give zero star stole card info play store receipt purchase google reporting fraud


Group ID: G5
Theme: General Experience
Review IDs: 11, 1766, 2173, 2271, 2413, 2791, 2806, 3298, 3734, 4473
Example Reviews:
wonderful magical healing mindset regulator love
best meditation app ever
really like app feature would drastically improve quality life able queue create playlist
app changed life helped find peace absolute wealth knowledge various resource help throughout day

spec_generation.system_prompt: You are a requirements engineering analyst.
spec_generation.user_prompt:
IMPORTANT:
- Output ONLY valid Markdown following this template
- Do NOT include any explanation, preamble, or code blocks
- Generate 2-3 system requirements per persona
- Requirement ID must be FR plus number (FR1, FR2, ...)
- Include the following fields for each requirement:

# Requirement ID: <FR#>

* Description: <Describe the functionality the system must provide>
* Source Persona: <Persona name used to generate this requirement>
* Traceability: Derived from review group: <G1, G2, ...>
* Acceptance Criteria: <Qualitative criteria in "Given/When/Then" format>

- Traceability must reference the review group used to generate the persona in the form "Derived from review group: G1, G2, ..."
- Acceptance Criteria must include qualitative criteria

Persona Data:
{
  "id": "P1",
  "name": "Frustrated Tech User",
  "description": "A user who struggles with technical issues",
  "derived_from_group": "G1",
  "goals": [
    "Use the app without technical issues",
    "Access meditation content"
  ],
  "pain_points": [
    "App malfunctions",
    "Crashes upon launch"
  ],
  "context": [
    "Tries to use the app for meditation",
    "Needs to upgrade or update the app"
  ],
  "constraints": [
    "Limited technical expertise",
    "Needs to resolve issues quickly"
  ],
  "evidence_reviews": [
    "806, 983, 1111, 1286, 1989, 229, 2538, 3025, 3644, 423"
  ]
}
{
  "id": "P2",
  "name": "Budget-Conscious User",
  "description": "A user concerned about payment and subscription",
  "derived_from_group": "G2",
  "goals": [
    "Understand payment terms",
    "Get value for money"
  ],
  "pain_points": [
    "Unexpected charges",
    "Difficulty canceling subscription"
  ],
  "context": [
    "Tries to manage subscription",
    "Compares features and prices"
  ],
  "constraints": [
    "Limited budget",
    "Wants transparency in billing"
  ],
  "evidence_reviews": [
    "1337, 2504, 3311, 3356, 4061, 4535, 4569, 4634, 709, 3988"
  ]
}
{
  "id": "P3",
  "name": "Content Seeker",
  "description": "A user looking for relevant content and features",
  "derived_from_group": "G3",
  "goals": [
    "Find relevant meditation content",
    "Use features that support meditation"
  ],
  "pain_points": [
    "Difficulty finding content",
    "Long loading times"
  ],
  "context": [
    "Explores the app's content library",
    "Seeks features that enhance meditation"
  ],
  "constraints": [
    "Values relevant content",
    "Wants an engaging user experience"
  ],
  "evidence_reviews": [
    "1411, 4611, 4388, 1633, 2146, 2162, 3451, 4509, 521, 4470"
  ]
}
{
  "id": "P4",
  "name": "Dissatisfied Customer",
  "description": "A user with poor customer service experience",
  "derived_from_group": "G4",
  "goals": [
    "Resolve issues with customer service",
    "Have a positive experience"
  ],
  "pain_points": [
    "Unhelpful customer service",
    "Difficulty resolving issues"
  ],
  "context": [
    "Contacts customer service",
    "Seeks a resolution to problems"
  ],
  "constraints": [
    "Values good customer service",
    "Wants issues resolved efficiently"
  ],
  "evidence_reviews": [
    "311, 729, 1118, 2386, 2924, 3403, 3523, 3899, 4171, 4260"
  ]
}
{
  "id": "P5",
  "name": "Engaged User",
  "description": "A user with a positive general experience",
  "derived_from_group": "G5",
  "goals": [
    "Use the app to improve well-being",
    "Explore features and content"
  ],
  "pain_points": [
    "None or minimal"
  ],
  "context": [
    "Uses the app regularly",
    "Recommends the app to others"
  ],
  "constraints": [
    "Values the app's benefits",
    "Wants to continue using the app"
  ],
  "evidence_reviews": [
    "11, 1766, 2173, 2271, 2413, 2791, 2806, 3298, 3734, 4473"
  ]
}

Output requirements for all personas in a single Markdown response.

test_generation.system_prompt: You are a test automation analyst. Generate clear validation scenarios for each system requirement.
test_generation.user_prompt:
You are a JSON generator.

IMPORTANT:
- Output ONLY valid JSON
- Generate at least two validation test scenario per requirement
- Each test scenario must include:
  - test_id: unique identifier (T1, T2, ...)
  - requirement_id: the requirement it validates
  - scenario_description: brief description of the validation scenario
  - steps: list of steps describing how to perform the test
  - expected_outcome: the expected result that satisfies the requirement

- tests must be actionable and specific, use professional language
- steps and expected outcomes must be qualitative

Requirements:
{
  "requirement_id": "FR1",
  "description": "The system must launch without crashing or malfunctioning to allow users to access meditation content.",
  "source_persona": "Frustrated Tech User",
  "traceability": "Derived from review group: G1",
  "acceptance_criteria": ""
}
{
  "requirement_id": "FR2",
  "description": "The system must provide clear and transparent payment terms to help users understand their subscription and avoid unexpected charges.",
  "source_persona": "Budget-Conscious User",
  "traceability": "Derived from review group: G2",
  "acceptance_criteria": ""
}
{
  "requirement_id": "FR3",
  "description": "The system must provide a search function that allows users to easily find relevant meditation content.",
  "source_persona": "Content Seeker",
  "traceability": "Derived from review group: G3",
  "acceptance_criteria": ""
}
{
  "requirement_id": "FR4",
  "description": "The system must provide helpful and responsive customer service to resolve user issues efficiently.",
  "source_persona": "Dissatisfied Customer",
  "traceability": "Derived from review group: G4",
  "acceptance_criteria": ""
}
{
  "requirement_id": "FR5",
  "description": "The system must provide a seamless and engaging user experience to keep users engaged and motivated to continue using the app.",
  "source_persona": "Engaged User",
  "traceability": "Derived from review group: G5",
  "acceptance_criteria": ""
}
{
  "requirement_id": "FR6",
  "description": "The system must minimize loading times to ensure users can access content quickly.",
  "source_persona": "Content Seeker",
  "traceability": "Derived from review group: G3",
  "acceptance_criteria": ""
}
{
  "requirement_id": "FR7",
  "description": "The system must allow users to easily cancel their subscription if desired.",
  "source_persona": "Budget-Conscious User",
  "traceability": "Derived from review group: G2",
  "acceptance_criteria": ""
}
{
  "requirement_id": "FR8",
  "description": "The system must provide features that support meditation and help users achieve their well-being goals.",
  "source_persona": "Engaged User",
  "traceability": "Derived from review group: G5",
  "acceptance_criteria": ""
}
{
  "requirement_id": "FR9",
  "description": "The system must handle technical issues efficiently to minimize user frustration.",
  "source_persona": "Frustrated Tech User",
  "traceability": "Derived from review group: G1",
  "acceptance_criteria": ""
}

Return strictly in this format:

{
  "tests": [
    {
      "test_id": "T1",
      "requirement_id": "FR1",
      "scenario_description": "...",
      "steps": ["step 1", "step 2"],
      "expected_outcome": "..."
    }
  ]
}
